title: PayPal Appoints Enrique Lores As CEO And David Dorman As Independent Board Chair
text: PayPal appointed Enrique Lores as President and CEO effective March 1, 2026, succeeding Alex Chriss. Lores brings extensive executive experience from six years as President and CEO of HP Inc. David Dorman appointed Independent Board Chair. Leadership transition signals strategic shift with focus on operational efficiency. Frank Keller appointed President of Checkout Solutions & PayPal, Alexis Sowa interim lead of Consumer Financial Services & Venmo, Jeff Pomeroy interim lead of Payment Services & Crypto. Antonio Lucio joined as Chief Marketing Officer, Anshu Bhardwaj appointed Chief AI Transformation & Simplification Officer.
